task_completion.description: Navigate to the WooCommerce Products page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress admin dashboard is visible with the 'Products' page loaded, showing a list of products.

task_completion.description: Select the three target products using their checkboxes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkboxes next to 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones', 'Organic Cotton T-Shirt', and 'Merino Wool Sweater' are checked.
The Bulk Edit panel is expanded at the top of the product list, typically triggered by selecting 'Edit' from the 'Bulk actions' dropdown and clicking 'Apply'.

task_completion.description: Set the Featured status to 'Yes' in the Bulk Edit panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the Bulk Edit panel, the 'Featured' dropdown is set to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Apply the bulk edit and verify the products are marked as featured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., '3 products updated') is visible, and/or the star icons in the 'Featured' column for the three target products are filled/solid.

integrity.description: The agent used the WordPress web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the WordPress admin dashboard, not a terminal using WP-CLI commands.

integrity.description: The agent used the bulk edit feature rather than editing products individually.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Bulk Edit panel is visible in at least one screenshot, proving the agent didn't just click the individual star icons or edit products one by one.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: No screenshots show phpMyAdmin, terminal SQL commands, or other database management interfaces.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target products to be featured: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones (SKU: WBH-001), Organic Cotton T-Shirt (SKU: OCT-BLK-M), and Merino Wool Sweater (SKU: MWS-GRY-L). The final state should have exactly 3 products marked as featured out of the 12 total products in the store.
